solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_init_svelte_scale_from_fill_height requires 'scale' and 'fill_height' on the same line with 'column' in surrounding context — this is very specific to the gold patch's approach. An alternative fix could set scale differently (e.g., via a separate function or CSS class) and would fail. test_blocks_svelte_forwards_fill_height requires 'fill_height' to appear in exactly >=2 config contexts with specific neighboring keywords, matching the gold patch's exact structure.

These require actual code changes to pass.
